ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "tripduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bikeid" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip route */,
  "route_elevation" REAL /* Elevation gain of the trip route */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bikeid FOREIGN KEY ("bikeid") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "bike_availability" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., Active, Inactive, Under Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Maintenance, Out of Service) */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., Road Bike, Mountain Bike) */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of gears (e.g., Single-Speed, Multi-Speed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (1 = Male, 2 = Female, 0 = Unknown) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Routine Check, Repair) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the maintenance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Debit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity on that date */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic record */,
  "traffic_condition" TEXT /* Traffic condition on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_info" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "route_elevation" REAL /* Elevation gain of the route */,
  "route_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)
